title: Accessible Tabs

statement.markdown:
## Description: Create a tabbed interface that allows users to switch between different views. Ensure that the tabs are accessible for users with screen readers, and that the current active tab is indicated properly.
## Requirements
1. Use HTML Semantics to define the structure of the tabbed interface.
2. Use ARIA attributes to provide accessibility information for the tabs.
3. Implement JavaScript to handle tab switching and update the active tab indicator.
4. Use a CSS framework like Tailwind CSS to style the tabs.

constraints: No external libraries can be used.
The solution must be self-contained in the provided starter code.
